name: Resize Observer API
performance_characteristics: Fires per-element size-change callbacks synchronously before paint; avoids window resize polling and layout thrash
unsuitable_contexts: tracking position/scroll changes (it only reports size, not coordinates)
strengths: Baseline everywhere; element-level size observation independent of the viewport
Foundation for container-responsive components and charts/canvas resizing
Avoids costly global resize listeners and manual measurement loops
Provides content-box, border-box and device-pixel content-box dimensions
weaknesses: Easy to cause 'ResizeObserver loop' warnings when callbacks mutate observed size
Reports size only, not visibility or position on screen
Heavy synchronous work inside the callback can delay paint
